justification: All 5 ACs implemented with correct HTTP codes and error codes. AC5 idempotency is distinctly handled (short-circuits after findById, skips both findByEmail and updateEmail). AC2 conflict check is separate (findByEmail returns a different user). AC3 uses a simple regex, no external library. Tests cover all 5 ACs with explicit describe blocks and test names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to specific tests. files_changed lists both handler and test file.

observations.text: AC5 idempotency correctly short-circuits before findByEmail, making it clearly distinct from AC2 conflict logic
Guard ordering explicitly tested (AC3 format check fires before AC4 user lookup), showing defensive validation order
Side-effect isolation verified — tests assert updateEmail/findByEmail are NOT called in error and idempotent paths
No external validation library — uses simple regex for email format check
26 tests across all 5 ACs with parameterised invalid email cases for AC3
